session_summary: This 2026-06-06 session designed and stood up the manuscript plan system. Marcus directed the AI to investigate an exemplar repo's multi-level JSON plan, then steered the design toward a strategic, multi-session human-AI collaboration apparatus (project manager, citation-discipline hook, level-4 evidence map), and ratified the IMRaD-with-Methods-as-workflow restructuring as D-09. The human's role was almost entirely architectural and directive: setting the agenda, importing a model from another project, insisting on specific safeguards, and locking the structural decision.

coded_turns.quote: This is going to require human in the loop. I want you to investigate how the manuscript for C:\Users\marcu\git-repositories\SAMPLE-STRATEGY-ECD. Notice how there was a json file with multiple levels
coded_turns.note: Opens new direction: investigate exemplar repo's multi-level JSON plan as a model to mimic for manuscript collaboration.

coded_turns.quote: And does the commit history give you insights on how the process unfolded. How human in the loop refined the writing?
coded_turns.note: Asks AI to mine the exemplar's commit history for how the human-in-the-loop refinement process unfolded.

coded_turns.quote: the lag was a rhetorical structure for that type of paper, doesn’t need to be replicated here. But what does survive is the need for a AI human collaboration in the writing exercise that is strategic, goal oriented, and that spans multiple sessions
coded_turns.note: Rejects copying the exemplar's lag device; reframes the goal as strategic multi-session collaboration with memory; floats an agent.

coded_turns.quote: But we need a project manager because I’m juggling a lot of things and I need to know where we are in the process.
coded_turns.note: Imposes a requirement for a project-manager component grounded in the human's real workload constraint.

coded_turns.quote: I think level 4 is important even if it is redundant. And we should have a hook to maintain citation discipline in the JSON just like we did with the derivation. We will be citing more articles
coded_turns.note: Keeps redundant level-4 evidence map; extends citation-discipline hook into the plan JSONs anticipating more citations.

coded_turns.quote: show me the level1 thesis here
coded_turns.note: Asks to see the drafted level-1 thesis inline for review.

coded_turns.quote: we are going to need to do more of an introduction, background, methods, results, conclusion. Remember thatr tthis whole AI-human dderivation is a new thing. So the methods section is really where we state the workflow we used to arrive at claims
coded_turns.note: Rejects theory-paper structure; mandates IMRaD with Methods as the AI-human workflow that defends the claims.
coded_turns.artifact_hint: D-09 IMRaD with Methods-as-workflow; level1-thesis.json amendment

coded_turns.quote: Yes that matches my intent, record D-09 and amend level 1
coded_turns.note: Ratifies D-09 (IMRaD/Methods-as-workflow) and directs recording it plus amending the level-1 plan.
coded_turns.artifact_hint: D-09 recorded in decisions.md; level1-thesis.json amended

coded_turns.quote: Remind me how to invoke skills you made for this session.
coded_turns.note: Routine operational request: how to invoke the newly built skills (/status, /section-review).

ai_side.evidence: No build work started — tell me where you want to take this (e.g., start with the deconstruction/lag audit ... or set up the level-1 thesis file first for you to react to)
ai_side.note: AI withholds build work and surfaces the next-step choice to the human.

ai_side.evidence: If you want that preserved for mi-spectral ... we'd add one artifact: commit the annotated section extract alongside the update script.
Say the word and I'll build it, starting with `level1-thesis.json` and the status schema so you have something concrete to react to.
ai_side.note: AI gates the build on explicit human go-ahead and offers a concrete first artifact.

ai_side.evidence: ratifying D-03/D-04/D-05/D-08 (or amending them) sets the standard every section review is graded against
ai_side.note: AI puts decision blocks to the human as the explicit annotation targets.

ai_side.evidence: Two things worth your input before I land it: (a) anything you want added to or cut from the Methods inventory above, and (b) whether the Results section keeps the current internal order
ai_side.note: AI flags two open sub-choices for human input before locking D-09.

proposed_codes.name: import-external-pattern
proposed_codes.definition: Human brings a structure, workflow, or artifact pattern from another project/repo and directs the AI to adapt it to the current work.
proposed_codes.example_quote: I want you to investigate how the manuscript for ...SAMPLE-STRATEGY-ECD. Notice how there was a json file with multiple levels ... We want to mimic that.
